issue.title: [bug]: "Select" Component (BaseUI) render the "value" prop not the Text
issue.body:
### Describe the bug

```
						<Select>
							<SelectTrigger className="w-[180px]">
								<SelectValue placeholder="Theme" />
							</SelectTrigger>
							<SelectContent>
								<SelectGroup>
									<SelectItem value="light">Light</SelectItem>
									<SelectItem value="dark">Dark</SelectItem>
									<SelectItem value="system">System</SelectItem>
								</SelectGroup>
							</SelectContent>
						</Select>
```


In this example the Select component render values when select it, "light" instead of "Light"

### Affected component/components

Select

### How to reproduce

try this and change the selected one to anything


```
						<Select>
							<SelectTrigger className="w-[180px]">
								<SelectValue placeholder="Theme" />
							</SelectTrigger>
							<SelectContent>
								<SelectGroup>
									<SelectItem value="light">Light</SelectItem>
									<SelectItem value="dark">Dark</SelectItem>
									<SelectItem value="system">System</SelectItem>
								</SelectGroup>
							</SelectContent>
						</Select>
```


### Codesandbox/StackBlitz link

gg

### Logs

```bash

```

### System Info

```bash
MacOS, Brave, Nextjs, BaseUI
```

### Before submitting

- [x] I've made research efforts and searched the documentation
- [x] I've searched for existing issues

fixDiff:
diff --git a/apps/v4/content/docs/components/base/select.mdx b/apps/v4/content/docs/components/base/select.mdx
index 5282d7d547c..53e0c848afb 100644
--- a/apps/v4/content/docs/components/base/select.mdx
+++ b/apps/v4/content/docs/components/base/select.mdx
@@ -67,15 +67,23 @@ import {
 ```
 
 ```tsx showLineNumbers
-<Select>
+const items = [
+  { label: "Light", value: "light" },
+  { label: "Dark", value: "dark" },
+  { label: "System", value: "system" },
+]
+
+<Select items={items}>
   <SelectTrigger className="w-[180px]">
     <SelectValue placeholder="Theme" />
   </SelectTrigger>
   <SelectContent>
     <SelectGroup>
-      <SelectItem value="light">Light</SelectItem>
-      <SelectItem value="dark">Dark</SelectItem>
-      <SelectItem value="system">System</SelectItem>
+      {items.map((item) => (
+        <SelectItem key={item.value} value={item.value}>
+          {item.label}
+        </SelectItem>
+      ))}
     </SelectGroup>
   </SelectContent>
 </Select>
